response.content:
The concentration risk in the Whitman Family Office holdings includes the following details:

- Top single-name concentration of invested holdings ex-cash: {{figure_0_top_single_name_concentration_of_invested_holdings_ex_cash}}.
- Concentration breach count: {{figure_1_concentration_breach_count}}.
- Diversification HHI: {{figure_2_diversification_hhi}}.
- Single-name threshold: {{figure_3_single_name_threshold}}.

There are multiple breaches concerning individual holdings exceeding the single-name threshold, indicating overconcentration risk in the portfolio.
